title: Glycine-HCl Buffer Preparation
author: Neilier Junior
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfybjpsn

steps.title: pH range
steps.instruction: pH range: pH 2.2 to pH 3.6 (a) 0.1 M Glycine: 7.5 g L -1 (M.W.: 75.0 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, glycine and indicated volume of hydrochloric acid. %s %s

substeps.instruction: M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, glycine and indicated volume of hydrochloric acid. %s %s

steps.title: Mix and adjust the final volume...
steps.instruction: Mix and adjust the final volume to 100 mL with deionized water.

steps.title: Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter
steps.instruction: Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter
